type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: CO levels have increased from 24.00 in 2012 to 6,312.38 in 2013 and finally to 10,391.94T in 2014 as the on-site wood waste incinerator was shutdown in 2012 and restarted in Q2 of 2013 and ran fully in 2014.  This level has been determined using Part 4 CAC Releases for wood waste conical burners.
